# OUR PROGRAMS
#### Social Entreprise Co-creation
- Building community-owned social enterprises
- Coaching youths on AssetBased Community Development
- Social Busines Modeling sprints around the Sustainable Development Goals
#### Positive Youth Development
- Developing 21st Century skills among youth
- Advocating for enabling environment for young people
- Promoting youth engagement and contribution
#### Partnerships Transforming Africa
- Implementing joint projects and
activities to respond to youth
development and community
resilience challenges in Kenya
and across Africa
- Fostering collaboration in youth
development and social
entrepreneurship
